data.title: GREEN: Implement commands.format_check in gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

Add commands.format_check support to gate-2b-blast-radius.sh. Uses global _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE variable injected into emit_signal().

## Changes to plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh

### 1. Add SCRIPT_DIR resolution (after set -uo pipefail, before argument parsing)
  SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

### 2. Add config resolution block (after REPO_ROOT is resolved, before emit_signal function)
  _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE=""
  CMD_FORMAT_CHECK=""
  _fc_config="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/dso-config.conf"
  if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/read-config.sh" && -f "$_fc_config" ]]; then
      CMD_FORMAT_CHECK=$("$SCRIPT_DIR/read-config.sh" "commands.format_check" "$_fc_config" 2>/dev/null || true)
  fi
  if [[ -z "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" ]]; then
      echo "[DSO WARN] commands.format_check not configured — skipping format check." >&2
  fi

### 3. Modify emit_signal() to append _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE
  emit_signal() {
      local triggered="$1"
      local evidence="${2}${_FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE}"
      local confidence="$3"
      ...
  }

### 4. After FILE_PATH is validated (not empty, file exists), run format check on the file
  if [[ -n "$CMD_FORMAT_CHECK" && -n "$FILE_PATH" && -f "$FILE_PATH" ]]; then
      # shellcheck disable=SC2086
      if ! $CMD_FORMAT_CHECK "$FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE=" Also: format check failed (commands.format_check).      fi
  fi

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh

## Acceptance criteria
- RED tests from Task 95f5-e5ed pass GREEN for gate-2b tests
- When commands.format_check configured + format check passes: gate signal unchanged
- When commands.format_check configured + format check fails: evidence includes 'Also: format check failed'
- When commands.format_check absent: [DSO WARN] on stderr, gate signal unchanged, exit 0
- script still always exits 0
- gate-signal-schema contract preserved (no new JSON fields)
